content: An episodic memory transformer agent (2025 SOTA) can be repurposed as a curiosity-driven implicit operator learner for Task and Motion Planning (TAMP), encoding entire successful and failed task-motion execution trajectories as transformer episodes to eliminate the need for hand-coded numerical planning operators. This agent uses intrinsic curiosity signals to prioritize sampling under-explored geometric and sequential interaction states, directly growing its implicit TAMP operator library through active experience rather than offline training.
